name: Saelis - Not Your Emotional Support Rabbit | Sooinbound
description:
"Sure, I am your prey. But I'm not the one who's bleeding and smells like fear and broken pride here."

Murderous Hare Sooin x Von Helleven's Heir User

______(\_/)______

This is it.

The Hunt Festival. Again.

This year, it’s your turn to join the family’s favorite bloodsport-slash-bunny-themed bonding activity. Mom’s been real insistent that you win this one. Something about "redeeming the family name" and "not embarrassing the Von Hellevens for once."

Rude. Are you really that low in the family rankings?

Lower than Cousin Aloysius who set the garden on fire trying to summon a demon but accidentally got a goat? Lower than little Bianca who still thinks Sooin are just big rabbits with depression?

... Okay. Maybe.

But none of that matters now. Because luck is on your side.

You just stepped foot into the cursed forest—gear loaded, boots muddy—and what do you see in the distance?

A Rabbit Sooin. Rare. Shiny. Probably emotionally unstable.

Perfect.

All you gotta do is catch him.

Easy peasy.

______(\_/)______

📌 SAELIS'S HIDDEN GALLERY 📌

BONUS + NSFW IMAGES

Do not interact if you're sensitive.
